name: rank_permissions
description: Persistent rank-based permissions with editable rank prefixes and one universal chat format for all ranks.
globals: (function() { var ranks = database.table('rank_permissions_ranks'); var users = database.table('rank_permissions_users'); var formatKey = 'rank_permissions_global_chat_format'; var defaultFormat = '{prefix}&f{name}&7: &f{message}'; function arr(list) { var out = []; if (!list) return out; if (typeof list.length === 'number') { for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) out.push(String(list[i])); return out; } if (typeof list.size === 'function') { for (var j = 0; j < list.size(); j++) out.push(String(list.get(j))); return out; } return out; } function norm(name) { return String(name || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/g, ''); } function msg(sender, text) { sender.sendMessage(text); } function rankIds() { return arr(ranks.ids()); } function getRank(name) { var id = norm(name); if (!id || !ranks.has(id)) return null; return ranks.get(id); } function saveRank(rank) { ranks.put(rank.id, rank); } function getChatFormat() { var f = database.has(formatKey) ? database.get(formatKey) : null; if (typeof f !== 'string' || f.length === 0) return defaultFormat; return f; } function setChatFormat(format) { database.set(formatKey, String(format || defaultFormat)); } function ensureSetup() { if (!database.has(formatKey)) database.set(formatKey, defaultFormat); var ids = rankIds(); if (ids.length === 0) { ranks.put('member', { id: 'member', name: 'member', prefix: '&7[Member]&r ', permissions: {}, defaultRank: true }); return; } var hasDefault = false; for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) { var r = ranks.get(ids[i]); if (!r) continue; var changed = false; if (r.defaultRank) hasDefault = true; if (!r.permissions) { r.permissions = {}; changed = true; } if (changed) saveRank(r); } if (!hasDefault) { var first = ranks.get(ids[0]); first.defaultRank = true; saveRank(first); } } function getDefaultRank() { ensureSetup(); var ids = rankIds(); for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) { var r = ranks.get(ids[i]); if (r && r.defaultRank) return r; } return null; } function userKey(playerName) { return String(playerName || '').toLowerCase(); } function getUserRankName(playerName) { ensureSetup(); var key = userKey(playerName); if (users.has(key)) { var u = users.get(key); if (u && u.rank && ranks.has(u.rank)) return u.rank; } var def = getDefaultRank(); return def ? def.id : null; } function renderFormat(rank) { var r = rank || getDefaultRank(); var fmt = getChatFormat(); var prefix = r && r.prefix ? r.prefix : ''; var rankId = r && r.id ? r.id : ''; return String(fmt).split('{prefix}').join(prefix).split('{rank}').join(rankId); } function validFormat(format) { var f = String(format || ''); return f.indexOf('{message}') >= 0 && (f.indexOf('{name}') >= 0 || f.indexOf('{player}') >= 0); } function applyRank(player) { ensureSetup(); var rankName = getUserRankName(player.getName()); if (!rankName) return false; var rank = getRank(rankName); if (!rank) return false; player.clearPermissions(); var perms = rank.permissions || {}; for (var p in perms) { if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(perms, p)) player.setPermission(p, perms[p] === true); } return true; } function applyAll() { var online = arr(server.getOnlinePlayers()); for (var i = 0; i < online.length; i++) { var p = server.getPlayer(online[i]); if (p) applyRank(p); } } function usage(sender) { msg(sender, '&6Rank commands:'); msg(sender, '&e/rank list &7- List ranks'); msg(sender, '&e/rank create <rank> [prefix] &7- Create a rank'); msg(sender, '&e/rank edit <rank> <field> <value...> &7- Edit a rank'); msg(sender, '&7  Fields: name, prefix, addperm, removeperm, default, clearperms'); msg(sender, '&e/rank setformat <format...> &7- Set the universal chat format for all ranks'); msg(sender, '&7  Format placeholders: {prefix}, {name}, {player}, {rank}, {message}'); msg(sender, '&e/rank delete <rank> &7- Delete a rank'); msg(sender, '&e/rank info <rank> &7- Show rank details'); msg(sender, '&e/rank addperm <rank> <permission> [true|false] &7- Add/deny permission'); msg(sender, '&e/rank removeperm <rank> <permission> &7- Remove permission entry'); msg(sender, '&e/rank setprefix <rank> <prefix...> &7- Set chat prefix'); msg(sender, '&e/rank setdefault <rank> &7- Set default rank'); msg(sender, '&e/rank set <player> <rank> &7- Assign rank'); msg(sender, '&e/rank unset <player> &7- Use default rank'); msg(sender, '&e/rank player <player> &7- Show player rank'); msg(sender, '&e/rank apply &7- Re-apply ranks to online players'); } return { ranks: ranks, users: users, defaultFormat: defaultFormat, arr: arr, norm: norm, msg: msg, getRank: getRank, saveRank: saveRank, getChatFormat: getChatFormat, setChatFormat: setChatFormat, ensureSetup: ensureSetup, getDefaultRank: getDefaultRank, getUserRankName: getUserRankName, renderFormat: renderFormat, validFormat: validFormat, applyRank: applyRank, applyAll: applyAll, usage: usage }; })

commands.label: rank
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { state.ensureSetup(); var sender = ctx.getSender(); var args = state.arr(ctx.getArgs()); if (args.length === 0 || String(args[0]).toLowerCase() === 'help') { state.usage(sender); return; } var sub = String(args[0]).toLowerCase(); function parseBool(raw) { var v = String(raw || '').toLowerCase(); if (v === 'false' || v === 'deny' || v === 'no') return false; if (v === 'true' || v === 'allow' || v === 'yes') return true; return null; } function preview(rank) { return state.renderFormat(rank).replace('{message}', 'Hello!').replace('{name}', 'Player').replace('{player}', 'Player'); } function setGlobalFormat(pieces) { if (pieces.length === 0) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank setformat <format...>'); sender.sendMessage('&7Placeholders: {prefix}, {name}, {player}, {rank}, {message}'); return; } var format = pieces.join(' '); if (!state.validFormat(format)) { sender.sendMessage('&cFormat must include {message} and either {name} or {player}.'); sender.sendMessage('&7Example: &e{prefix}&f{name}&7: &f{message}'); return; } state.setChatFormat(format); sender.sendMessage('&aUniversal chat format updated for all ranks.'); sender.sendMessage('&7Current: &r' + format); sender.sendMessage('&7Preview: &r' + preview(state.getDefaultRank())); } if (sub === 'setformat' || sub === 'format' || sub === 'chatformat' || sub === 'memberformat' || sub === 'defaultformat') { setGlobalFormat(args.slice(1)); return; } if (sub === 'edit') { if (args.length < 3) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank edit <rank> <name|prefix|addperm|removeperm|default|clearperms> [value...]'); sender.sendMessage('&7Note: chat format is universal. Use &e/rank setformat <format...>'); return; } var editRank = state.getRank(args[1]); if (!editRank) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } var field = String(args[2]).toLowerCase(); if (field === 'format' || field === 'setformat' || field === 'chatformat') { sender.sendMessage('&eChat format is now universal for all ranks.'); setGlobalFormat(args.slice(3)); return; } if (field === 'name' || field === 'rename') { if (args.length < 4) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank edit <rank> name <new_name>'); return; } var newId = state.norm(args[3]); if (!newId) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank names may only use letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.'); return; } if (newId === editRank.id) { sender.sendMessage('&cThat is already this rank name.'); return; } if (state.ranks.has(newId)) { sender.sendMessage('&cA rank with that name already exists.'); return; } var oldId = editRank.id; editRank.id = newId; editRank.name = newId; state.ranks.put(newId, editRank); state.ranks.delete(oldId); var userIds = state.arr(state.users.ids()); for (var ui = 0; ui < userIds.length; ui++) { var u = state.users.get(userIds[ui]); if (u && u.rank === oldId) { u.rank = newId; state.users.put(userIds[ui], u); } } state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aRenamed rank &e' + oldId + '&a to &e' + newId + '&a.'); return; } if (field === 'prefix' || field === 'setprefix') { editRank.prefix = args.length > 3 ? args.slice(3).join(' ') + ' ' : ''; state.saveRank(editRank); sender.sendMessage('&aPrefix updated for rank &e' + editRank.id + '&a.'); return; } if (field === 'addperm' || field === 'setperm' || field === 'perm' || field === 'permission') { if (args.length < 4) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank edit <rank> addperm <permission> [true|false]'); return; } var ep = String(args[3]).toLowerCase(); var ev = true; if (args.length >= 5) { var parsed = parseBool(args[4]); if (parsed === null) { sender.sendMessage('&cValue must be true or false.'); return; } ev = parsed; } if (!editRank.permissions) editRank.permissions = {}; editRank.permissions[ep] = ev; state.saveRank(editRank); state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aSet &e' + ep + '&a to ' + (ev ? '&atrue' : '&cfalse') + '&a for rank &e' + editRank.id + '&a.'); return; } if (field === 'removeperm' || field === 'delperm' || field === 'deleteperm') { if (args.length < 4) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank edit <rank> removeperm <permission>'); return; } var dp = String(args[3]).toLowerCase(); if (!editRank.permissions || !Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(editRank.permissions, dp)) { sender.sendMessage('&cThat permission is not set on this rank.'); return; } delete editRank.permissions[dp]; state.saveRank(editRank); state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aRemoved &e' + dp + '&a from rank &e' + editRank.id + '&a.'); return; } if (field === 'default' || field === 'setdefault') { var allDefault = state.arr(state.ranks.ids()); for (var ad = 0; ad < allDefault.length; ad++) { var adr = state.ranks.get(allDefault[ad]); adr.defaultRank = (adr.id === editRank.id); state.saveRank(adr); } state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aDefault rank is now &e' + editRank.id + '&a.'); return; } if (field === 'clearperms' || field === 'clearpermissions') { editRank.permissions = {}; state.saveRank(editRank); state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aCleared all permissions from rank &e' + editRank.id + '&a.'); return; } sender.sendMessage('&cUnknown edit field. Use: name, prefix, addperm, removeperm, default, clearperms.'); return; } if (sub === 'list') { var ids = state.arr(state.ranks.ids()); if (ids.length === 0) { sender.sendMessage('&cNo ranks exist.'); return; } sender.sendMessage('&6Ranks:'); for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) { var r = state.ranks.get(ids[i]); sender.sendMessage('&e- ' + r.id + (r.defaultRank ? ' &a(default)' : '') + (r.prefix ? ' &7prefix: ' + r.prefix : '')); } sender.sendMessage('&6Universal chat format: &r' + state.getChatFormat()); return; } if (sub === 'create') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank create <rank> [prefix]'); return; } var id = state.norm(args[1]); if (!id) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank names may only use letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.'); return; } if (state.ranks.has(id)) { sender.sendMessage('&cThat rank already exists.'); return; } var prefix = args.length > 2 ? args.slice(2).join(' ') + ' ' : ''; var isDefault = state.arr(state.ranks.ids()).length === 0; state.ranks.put(id, { id: id, name: id, prefix: prefix, permissions: {}, defaultRank: isDefault }); sender.sendMessage('&aCreated rank &e' + id + '&a.'); return; } if (sub === 'delete') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank delete <rank>'); return; } var delId = state.norm(args[1]); var delRank = state.getRank(delId); if (!delRank) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } if (delRank.defaultRank) { sender.sendMessage('&cYou cannot delete the default rank. Set another default first.'); return; } state.ranks.delete(delId); var userIds2 = state.arr(state.users.ids()); for (var d = 0; d < userIds2.length; d++) { var u2 = state.users.get(userIds2[d]); if (u2 && u2.rank === delId) state.users.delete(userIds2[d]); } state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aDeleted rank &e' + delId + '&a. Affected players now use the default rank.'); return; } if (sub === 'info') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank info <rank>'); return; } var info = state.getRank(args[1]); if (!info) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } sender.sendMessage('&6Rank: &e' + info.id + (info.defaultRank ? ' &a(default)' : '')); sender.sendMessage('&6Prefix: &r' + (info.prefix || '&7none')); sender.sendMessage('&6Universal format: &r' + state.getChatFormat()); sender.sendMessage('&6Rendered for this rank: &r' + state.renderFormat(info)); var perms = info.permissions || {}; var count = 0; sender.sendMessage('&6Permissions:'); for (var perm in perms) { if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(perms, perm)) { count++; sender.sendMessage('&e- ' + perm + '&7 = ' + (perms[perm] === true ? '&atrue' : '&cfalse')); } } if (count === 0) sender.sendMessage('&7None'); return; } if (sub === 'addperm') { if (args.length < 3) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank addperm <rank> <permission> [true|false]'); return; } var rank = state.getRank(args[1]); if (!rank) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } var permission = String(args[2]).toLowerCase(); var value = true; if (args.length >= 4) { var pv = parseBool(args[3]); if (pv === null) { sender.sendMessage('&cValue must be true or false.'); return; } value = pv; } if (!rank.permissions) rank.permissions = {}; rank.permissions[permission] = value; state.saveRank(rank); state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aSet &e' + permission + '&a to ' + (value ? '&atrue' : '&cfalse') + '&a for rank &e' + rank.id + '&a.'); return; } if (sub === 'removeperm') { if (args.length < 3) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank removeperm <rank> <permission>'); return; } var rr = state.getRank(args[1]); if (!rr) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } var rp = String(args[2]).toLowerCase(); if (!rr.permissions || !Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(rr.permissions, rp)) { sender.sendMessage('&cThat permission is not set on this rank.'); return; } delete rr.permissions[rp]; state.saveRank(rr); state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aRemoved &e' + rp + '&a from rank &e' + rr.id + '&a.'); return; } if (sub === 'setprefix') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank setprefix <rank> <prefix...>'); return; } var pr = state.getRank(args[1]); if (!pr) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } pr.prefix = args.length > 2 ? args.slice(2).join(' ') + ' ' : ''; state.saveRank(pr); sender.sendMessage('&aPrefix updated for rank &e' + pr.id + '&a.'); return; } if (sub === 'setdefault') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank setdefault <rank>'); return; } var def = state.getRank(args[1]); if (!def) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } var all = state.arr(state.ranks.ids()); for (var a = 0; a < all.length; a++) { var ar = state.ranks.get(all[a]); ar.defaultRank = (ar.id === def.id); state.saveRank(ar); } state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aDefault rank is now &e' + def.id + '&a.'); return; } if (sub === 'set') { if (args.length < 3) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank set <player> <rank>'); return; } var targetName = args[1]; var setRank = state.getRank(args[2]); if (!setRank) { sender.sendMessage('&cRank not found.'); return; } state.users.put(targetName.toLowerCase(), { name: targetName, rank: setRank.id }); var target = server.getPlayer(targetName); if (target) { state.applyRank(target); target.sendMessage('&aYour rank is now &e' + setRank.id + '&a.'); } sender.sendMessage('&aSet &e' + targetName + '&a to rank &e' + setRank.id + '&a.'); return; } if (sub === 'unset') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank unset <player>'); return; } var unsetName = args[1]; state.users.delete(unsetName.toLowerCase()); var unsetTarget = server.getPlayer(unsetName); if (unsetTarget) state.applyRank(unsetTarget); sender.sendMessage('&aUnset custom rank for &e' + unsetName + '&a. They now use the default rank.'); return; } if (sub === 'player') { if (args.length < 2) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /rank player <player>'); return; } var pn = args[1]; var rn = state.getUserRankName(pn); sender.sendMessage('&e' + pn + '&7 has rank &e' + rn + '&7.'); return; } if (sub === 'apply' || sub === 'reload') { state.applyAll(); sender.sendMessage('&aRe-applied rank permissions to online players.'); return; } sender.sendMessage('&cUnknown subcommand. Use /rank help.'); })

commands.label: defaultprefix
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { state.ensureSetup(); var sender = ctx.getSender(); var args = state.arr(ctx.getArgs()); var rank = state.getDefaultRank(); if (!rank) { sender.sendMessage('&cNo default rank exists.'); return; } if (args.length === 0) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /defaultprefix <prefix...>'); sender.sendMessage('&7Use &e/defaultprefix clear &7to remove the default rank prefix.'); sender.sendMessage('&7Current default rank: &e' + rank.id); sender.sendMessage('&7Current prefix: &r' + (rank.prefix || '&7none')); return; } var raw = args.join(' '); if (String(raw).toLowerCase() === 'clear' || String(raw).toLowerCase() === 'none' || String(raw).toLowerCase() === 'off') { rank.prefix = ''; } else { rank.prefix = raw + ' '; } state.saveRank(rank); sender.sendMessage('&aDefault rank prefix updated for &e' + rank.id + '&a.'); sender.sendMessage('&7New prefix: &r' + (rank.prefix || '&7none')); sender.sendMessage('&7Preview: &r' + state.renderFormat(rank).replace('{message}', 'Hello!').replace('{name}', 'Player').replace('{player}', 'Player')); })

commands.label: memberprefix
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { state.ensureSetup(); var sender = ctx.getSender(); var args = state.arr(ctx.getArgs()); var rank = state.ranks.has('member') ? state.getRank('member') : state.getDefaultRank(); if (!rank) { sender.sendMessage('&cNo member/default rank exists.'); return; } if (args.length === 0) { sender.sendMessage('&cUsage: /memberprefix <prefix...>'); sender.sendMessage('&7Use &e/memberprefix clear &7to remove the prefix.'); sender.sendMessage('&7Target rank: &e' + rank.id); sender.sendMessage('&7Current prefix: &r' + (rank.prefix || '&7none')); return; } var raw = args.join(' '); if (String(raw).toLowerCase() === 'clear' || String(raw).toLowerCase() === 'none' || String(raw).toLowerCase() === 'off') { rank.prefix = ''; } else { rank.prefix = raw + ' '; } state.saveRank(rank); sender.sendMessage('&aMember/default prefix updated for &e' + rank.id + '&a.'); sender.sendMessage('&7New prefix: &r' + (rank.prefix || '&7none')); sender.sendMessage('&7Preview: &r' + state.renderFormat(rank).replace('{message}', 'Hello!').replace('{name}', 'Player').replace('{player}', 'Player')); })

events.code: (function(ctx, state) { state.ensureSetup(); var player = ctx.getPlayer(); if (!player) return; var rankName = state.getUserRankName(player.getName()); var rank = state.getRank(rankName); ctx.setFormat(state.renderFormat(rank)); })
